title: Observe the Moon
description: Nova encourages you to sketch lunar features as an introduction to observational astronomy.

dialogue.text: Nova here! Before we engineer spacecraft, it's helpful to study the skies. Tonight let's observe the Moon together.
Use a small telescope or binoculars and sketch the major craters you see. This design practice sharpens your eye for future missions.
Nice work! With regular observation you'll overcome many challenges when plotting real rocket trajectories.
